denmark.description: The official digital ID for secure login to public services, banks, and many private companies in Denmark.
Denmark's most popular mobile payment solution for easy money transfers, in-store payments, and online shopping.
The official travel planner for all public transport in Denmark, providing real-time departure and arrival information.
Connects you with your general practitioner to book appointments, renew prescriptions, and communicate securely.

united-kingdom.description: Access your NHS services, book GP appointments, order repeat prescriptions, view your health record, and get health advice.
The ultimate public transport app for urban navigation, providing real-time information for buses, trains, tubes, taxis, and more across major UK cities.
Manage your money with a digital-first bank account, offering instant spending notifications, budgeting tools, and easy international transfers.
Book train and coach tickets across the UK and Europe, get live train times, platform information, and journey updates.

united-states.description: Helps manage mail, track packages, find post office locations, and schedule pickups for an essential federal service.
Manages prescriptions, finds CVS stores and MinuteClinics, and accesses digital coupons from one of the largest pharmacy chains.
Provides comprehensive navigation for driving, walking, cycling, and public transport across all US cities.
A widely used peer-to-peer payment app for sending and receiving money, splitting bills, and making purchases.

canada.description: Manage your tax and benefit information, view notices, and update personal details with the Canada Revenue Agency.
Connect with Canadian-licensed doctors and healthcare professionals for virtual consultations from your phone.
Essential for navigation, including public transit routes, schedules, and real-time directions across Canadian cities.
Manage your TD bank accounts, transfer funds (including Interac e-Transfer), pay bills, and find branch/ATM locations.

australia.description: Securely proves your identity online for accessing Australian government services like myGov, ATO, and Centrelink.
Manage your Medicare information, submit claims, access your digital card, and find healthcare providers.
Comprehensive navigation for driving, walking, cycling, and public transport across all major Australian cities.
Official mobile banking app for Commonwealth Bank customers, offering account management, payments, and budgeting tools. (Choose your specific bank's app once an account is opened.)

germany.description: Official app to use the online identification function of the German ID card, eID card, or electronic residence permit for digital government services.
Official app for Deutsche Bahn to find train connections, book tickets for national and regional transport, and check real-time information.
Book doctor appointments online quickly and easily, manage your health, and access teleconsultations in Germany.
Manage your N26 bank account, send money, and track transactions directly from your smartphone (popular neobank among expats).

japan.description: Essential for navigating Japan's extensive public transport system (trains, subways, buses), providing routes, timings, fares, and platform information.
Japan's most widely used QR code payment app, crucial for cashless transactions at convenience stores, supermarkets, restaurants, and various services.
The dominant messaging app in Japan, used for personal communication, group chats, official announcements, and often for customer service.
Indispensable for overcoming language barriers, offering text, voice, and image translation for daily life, shopping, and understanding documents.

france.description: Manage your health insurance, access reimbursements, find doctors, and get your vital card details.
Book doctor appointments, manage your health agenda, and access telehealth consultations across France.
Plan journeys, buy and validate transport tickets (Navigo pass, t+ tickets) for Paris and the Île-de-France region.
Send and receive money instantly, pay online, and manage various payment cards for daily transactions.
Create a digital identity from your new French national ID card to authenticate to online government services.

singapore.description: Provides secure access to over 200 government digital services, allowing for identity verification and digital signing.
Access your personal health records, medical appointments, health articles, and book polyclinic appointments.
Official app by LTA providing real-time bus arrival information, MRT updates, journey planning, and traffic incidents.
Manage your bank accounts, transfer funds with PayNow, pay bills, and access a wide range of banking services.
All-in-one superapp for ride-hailing, food delivery (GrabFood), parcel delivery, and widely used mobile payments (GrabPay).

netherlands.description: Official app for secure online authentication with Dutch government services, including tax, healthcare, and personal data access.
Comprehensive public transport planner for all modes (train, bus, tram, metro, ferry) across the Netherlands, including real-time updates.
Official mobile banking app for ING customers, essential for daily banking, transfers, and iDEAL online payments. (Similar apps exist for other major banks like ABN AMRO and Rabobank.)
Widely used app for easily sending and receiving payment requests (betaalverzoek) from friends, family, or small businesses, linking directly to your bank account.

sweden.description: Essential mobile electronic identification for logging into government services, banking, and signing documents.
Widely used mobile payment service for instant transfers between individuals and to businesses.
National healthcare portal for information, advice, and secure communication with healthcare providers, requires BankID.
Official app for planning journeys and purchasing tickets for public transport in the Stockholm region.

norway.description: Norway's official electronic identification app used for secure login and signing across banks, public services, and private businesses.
The official national health portal app for managing health services, appointments, prescriptions, and medical records in Norway.
Norway's most popular mobile payment app for sending money to individuals, paying in stores, and making online purchases.
The official app for journey planning and buying tickets for public transport (bus, tram, metro, ferry) in the Oslo and Viken region.

new-zealand.description: Manage your tax, view income, check payments, and update personal details with Inland Revenue (IRD).
Access your personal health information, manage prescriptions, and communicate with participating healthcare providers.
Plan your journey, view real-time public transport information, and manage your AT HOP card for Auckland's transport network.
Securely manage your bank accounts, make payments, transfer money, and access other essential banking services from ANZ New Zealand.

ireland.description: Essential for verifying identity to access various Irish government online services (e.g., Revenue, Social Welfare).
Manage and top up your Leap Card for public transport in Dublin and other Irish cities directly from your phone.
Provides real-time public transport information for bus, rail, and DART services across Ireland.
Widely used digital banking app for everyday payments, money transfers, and managing finances in Ireland.

switzerland.description: The official app for public transport in Switzerland, offering timetables, real-time information, and ticket purchases for trains, buses, and trams.
Switzerland's leading mobile payment solution for fast and secure payments in shops, online, for parking, and sending money to friends directly from your bank account.
Your digital identity for secure and easy login to numerous Swiss online services and portals, including some e-government applications and online banking.

south-korea.description: Essential for mobile identity verification, accessing government services, and secure online authentication in South Korea.
Official app by the National Health Insurance Service for checking health insurance details, medical history, and finding healthcare providers.
Widely used for public transport, walking, driving directions, and local search with highly detailed Korean map data.
The dominant messaging app in South Korea, essential for communication and includes Kakao Pay for easy mobile payments and transfers.

spain.description: Essential for secure digital identification and authentication when interacting with Spanish public administration services, including some healthcare portals.
Provides real-time public transport information, journey planning, and alerts for buses, trains, metros, and more across many Spanish cities.
Official app for Spain's national railway company, allowing you to search, book, and manage tickets for long-distance and regional trains.
Mobile banking app for CaixaBank, one of Spain's largest banks, offering account management, transfers, and integrating Bizum for instant payments.

italy.description: Official app from Poste Italiane to manage your SPID (Public Digital Identity System), essential for accessing Italian public services online.
The official app for accessing public administration services, receiving messages, and making payments to Italian public entities. Requires SPID or CIE.
Official app for purchasing train tickets, managing bookings, and checking real-time train status for national and regional rail services in Italy.
A popular independent mobile payment system in Italy for sending money to friends, paying in stores, and managing various transactions with cashback.

portugal.description: Official app to access public and private services using the Portuguese Digital Mobile Key (Chave Móvel Digital).
The official Portuguese National Health Service (SNS) app for scheduling appointments, accessing medical records, and health information.
A global app providing real-time public transport information, trip planning, and alerts for various cities in Portugal, including Lisbon and Porto.
Portugal's leading interbank payment service for instant transfers, online shopping, and ATM withdrawals without a card.

hong-kong.description: Official digital identity for secure authentication and access to various Hong Kong government online services.

hong-kong.app_name: HA Go (醫管局流動應用程式)
hong-kong.description: Official app for Hong Kong's public hospitals, managing appointments, viewing records, and making payments for Hospital Authority services.
Official app for Hong Kong's MTR, providing route planning, real-time train information, station facilities, and service updates.
Manage your Octopus cards and O! ePay account, check balance, top up, and make P2P payments widely accepted in HK for transport and retail.
A highly popular mobile payment app in Hong Kong for sending and receiving money to friends and making payments to merchants.

taiwan.app_name: 健保快易通 | 健康存摺 (My Health Bank)
taiwan.description: Access your National Health Insurance (NHI) records, medical history, vaccination records, and find healthcare providers.
Taiwan's dominant messaging app, essential for communication and widely used with its integrated LINE Pay for mobile payments.
Provides real-time bus arrival information and route planning for most cities across Taiwan.
A very popular mobile payment platform widely accepted at stores, restaurants, and for various services across Taiwan.

india.description: Official app to carry your Aadhaar profile digitally, manage services, and access Aadhaar-related features.
Government of India's secure cloud-based platform for issuance and verification of documents and certificates.
Secure and easy-to-use digital payment app for UPI transactions, bill payments, and money transfers.
Comprehensive navigation, real-time traffic updates, public transport information, and local discovery.
Book taxis, auto-rickshaws, and other vehicles for convenient and on-demand transportation.

uae.description: Your official digital identity for accessing government and private sector services across the UAE.
The official RTA app for planning journeys using public transport in Dubai, including metro, tram, buses, and marine transport.
A popular super-app for ride-hailing, food delivery, groceries, and payment services across the UAE.

saudi-arabia.description: Official Saudi Ministry of Interior app for accessing government services, managing residency, passports, and traffic violations.
A leading digital wallet in Saudi Arabia for payments, money transfers, bill payments, and financial services.
Popular ride-hailing service, also offering food delivery, grocery delivery, and other daily services.
Official Ministry of Health app for managing health appointments, viewing medical records, and accessing telehealth services.

thailand.description: The leading super app in Southeast Asia for ride-hailing, food delivery, grocery delivery, and package delivery.
Official mobile banking application for Kasikornbank, offering comprehensive financial services including transfers, bill payments, and PromptPay QR code transactions.
A widely used e-wallet for secure digital payments, mobile top-ups, bill payments, and online shopping across Thailand.

malaysia.description: Official Malaysian health app for vaccination records, health declarations, and accessing public health services.
Southeast Asia's leading superapp for ride-hailing, food/grocery delivery, and digital payments (GrabPay).
Widely accepted e-wallet for cashless payments, toll road payments, public transport top-ups, and various online/offline transactions.
Essential for navigation, finding places, public transport routes, and exploring local businesses and attractions.

indonesia.description: The official health app for Indonesia, storing vaccination records, health data, and providing access to public health services.
A super-app offering ride-hailing (motorbikes, cars), food/package delivery, and mobile payments (Gopay e-wallet).
Southeast Asia's leading super-app for ride-hailing (motorbikes, cars), food delivery, and mobile payments (often integrated with OVO).
A widely used standalone e-wallet for secure digital payments, money transfers, and bill payments across Indonesia.

south-africa.description: Request rides on demand with various vehicle options, widely used for transport in South African cities.
A popular mobile payment app for QR code payments at thousands of merchants across South Africa, linking directly to your bank card.
The official mobile banking app for Capitec Bank, one of South Africa's largest banks, offering easy management of accounts, payments, and transfers.
Essential for navigation, finding places, public transport routes, and traffic updates across South Africa.
An emergency response app connecting you directly to local police, ambulance, and other emergency services in South Africa.

chile.description: Official app to manage and use your ClaveÚnica (Single Key) for accessing various Chilean government online services and procedures.
Digital account and prepaid Mastercard (virtual and physical) for easy online payments, transfers, and managing finances in Chile, often accessible for new arrivals.
Official app to check balance, load your BIP! card, and plan routes for Santiago's integrated public transport system (buses, metro, Metrotren).
Popular ride-sharing service for convenient and reliable transportation across major Chilean cities.

poland.description: The official government app providing digital identity documents (e.g., ID card, driver's license) and access to various public services.
Official app for Poland's National Health Fund, allowing access to e-prescriptions, e-referrals, medical history, and appointments.
Essential for public transport, offering timetables, route planning, and ticket purchasing for most major Polish cities.
The mobile banking app of Poland's largest bank, enabling transfers, payments, and seamless BLIK mobile payments widely used across the country.
